name: Tortilla Roll-Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cream cheese, ranch dressing mix, and chopped green onions.
2. Spread the mixture evenly on each tortilla.
3. Layer the red pepper, celery, and black olives over the cream cheese mixture.
4. Roll up the tortillas tightly.
5. Wrap the roll-ups in plastic wrap.
6. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
7. Slice and serve.
